tests.test_name: Both inputs required before Check Coverage button is enabled
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: The Check Coverage button only becomes active once the user has provided both a user story and test cases, preventing incomplete submissions.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Check Coverage button is inactive when the page is first opened
Check Coverage button remains inactive after entering only a user story
Check Coverage button becomes active once test cases are also entered

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: After submitting both inputs, the user sees a results panel and download options with the coverage analysis.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are displayed to the user after a successful analysis
Users can download the coverage results once they are available

tests.test_name: Clear button resets all inputs and results
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: The Clear button returns the page to its initial state, wiping both input fields and hiding the results panel.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: User story field is cleared after clicking Clear
Test cases field is cleared after clicking Clear
Previously displayed coverage results are removed from view after clicking Clear

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the coverage service fails, the user sees a meaningful error message instead of a blank or broken page.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: User is informed of the failure when the coverage analysis cannot be completed

tests.test_name: Format selector is present and forwarded in payload
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: The test format selector is visible on the page and the user's chosen format is included when the coverage analysis is requested.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Users can see and interact with the test format selector
The selected format is correctly sent to the analysis service when coverage is checked

tests.test_name: Testing layers selection is forwarded in payload
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: The testing layer chosen by the user is included in the coverage analysis request.

test_coverage.verification_step: Compare request includes the selected testing layer
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The chosen testing layer is correctly passed to the analysis service when coverage is checked

tests.test_name: Changing test format clears test case content and filename
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the user switches the test format, any previously entered test case content and uploaded filename are automatically cleared to avoid mismatched data.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test cases field is emptied when the format is changed
Any uploaded filename is removed when the format is changed

tests.test_name: Changing test format does not clear story input
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: Switching the test format leaves the user story input untouched so the user does not need to re-enter it.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field retains its content when the test format is changed

tests.test_name: Changing test format clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the user changes the test format, any existing coverage results are hidden to prevent showing stale analysis.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously displayed coverage results are removed when the test format is changed

tests.test_name: Changing testing layers clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the user changes the testing layer selection, any existing coverage results are hidden to prevent showing stale analysis.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously displayed coverage results are removed when the testing layer is changed

tests.test_name: Changing data dictionary clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the user changes the data dictionary selection, any existing coverage results are hidden to prevent showing stale analysis.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Previously displayed coverage results are removed when the data dictionary is changed

tests.test_name: Editing story input clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the user edits the user story after a coverage analysis has been run, the results are hidden to reflect that the analysis is no longer current.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are cleared when the user story is modified

tests.test_name: Editing test input clears coverage result
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: When the user edits the test cases after a coverage analysis has been run, the results are hidden to reflect that the analysis is no longer current.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are cleared when the test cases are modified

tests.test_name: Story input persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A user's story input is preserved when they navigate away from the page and return, so they do not lose their work.

test_coverage.verification_step: Story input still contains my text
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field retains its content after the user leaves and returns to the page

tests.test_name: Test input persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A user's test case input is preserved when they navigate away from the page and return, so they do not lose their work.

test_coverage.verification_step: Test input still contains my text
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test cases field retains its content after the user leaves and returns to the page

tests.test_name: Selector state persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: The user's chosen test format and testing layer selections are remembered when they navigate away and return to the page.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The test format selector reflects the user's previous choice after returning to the page
The testing layer selector reflects the user's previous choice after returning to the page

tests.test_name: Coverage result persists after navigating away and back
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: A completed coverage analysis result remains visible when the user navigates away and returns, so they can review it without re-running the analysis.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are retained and displayed after the user leaves and returns to the page

tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — UI behaviour (mocked API)
tests.description: All user inputs are cleared when the user logs out, ensuring no data is left accessible to the next person who logs in.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user story field is blank after logging out and returning to the page
The test cases field is blank after logging out and returning to the page
